commits.message: docs: Add cost control summary and prevention guide
fix: Add strict cost controls to prevent + credit burn
chore: Add health check script for local development
feat: Enable GitHub PR auto-expansion for Subway Builder guild
Fix embedding field name and dimensions for full processing
Fix silent errors and enable OpenAI fallback for all failures
feat: Mention Proxy System with LLM Judgment Layer (#68)
Add OpenAI fallback to LLM service for when OpenRouter fails
feat: comprehensive safety system to prevent wasting money
fix: AI enrichment was completely broken - now fixed
chore: Finalize security patches for dependency tree
chore: Remove vulnerable @nuxt/content dependency
fix: improve error handling in bookmark loading
🧪 Add comprehensive test suite and quality auditing tools
feat: Add hand-written meta-newspapers and optimize generation speed
fix: Database persistence and pnpm migration for Docker
chore: Apply critical security patches to dependency tree
chore: remove debug logging from Polymarket investigation
docs: Add comprehensive dependency security audit & automated patch script
docs: Simplify metric constraint instructions with clear examples
docs: Add critical constraint rules for game-state metric placeholders
feat: Add memory leak verification script and update runbook
feat: Add velocity/pace metrics for "evolution" themed articles
fix: Polymarket button uses correct database ID (399) instead of event ID (23246)
feat: Add game-state-aware newspaper metrics for "magic moments"
fix: Resolve TypeScript errors in GitHub integration service
fix: Memory leak fixes for low-memory VPS stability
feat: Add accepted template examples to AI prompt for quality guidance
feat: Add city-specific cultural context to newspaper generation
fix: Additional memory leak fixes and graceful shutdown improvements
fix: Production hardening - memory leak fixes, log rotation, security configs
perf: Optimize template generation for speed - respect actual OpenRouter rate limits
feat: Implement true combinatorial newspaper template generation
fix: resolve build errors and disable LinkedIn capability
